fields.name: Dimension Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a dimension code to attach a dimension to a journal line.

fields.name: Dimension Value Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the original dimension value to register the transfer of items from the original dimension value to the new dimension value.

fields.name: Dimension Value ID
fields.tooltip: Uniquely identifies the original dimension value.

fields.name: New Dimension Value Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the new dimension value to register the transfer of items, from the original dimension value to the new dimension value.

fields.name: New Dimension Value ID
fields.tooltip: Uniquely identifies the new dimension value.

fields.name: Dimension Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the descriptive name of the Dimension Code field.

fields.name: Dimension Value Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the descriptive name of the original Dimension Value Code field.

fields.name: New Dimension Value Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the descriptive name of the New Dimension Value Code field.
